paragraphs: Overdue climbed to 55 — we need to reverse this today. This is above the 7-day average of 25 — the trend is heading the wrong direction. 41 tasks are actively in progress — that's solid execution across the board. 2 tasks should be active but are stuck waiting on blockers — these need immediate attention.

**Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199):** The oldest overdue task is 12 days past due with 15 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **17 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $26,394 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** 12 overdue — tackle the oldest first, they're the most likely to cascade. **4 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $16,830 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Kyle Aubry - Project 01:** 5 overdue — tackle the oldest first, they're the most likely to cascade. **13 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $21,177 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.
**Ginger Brown:** 5 overdue — tackle the oldest first, they're the most likely to cascade. **8 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 6 payment tasks due this week.
**Brandy Sexton (CNG2025-508):** Overdue count is climbing — now at 5. The PM needs to get ahead of this before it cascades. **7 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.
**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** 4 overdue — tackle the oldest first, they're the most likely to cascade. **3 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.

**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** Overdue count is climbing — now at 4. The PM needs to get ahead of this before it cascades. **4 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 3 payment tasks due this week.

**Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496):** 2 overdue — tackle the oldest first, they're the most likely to cascade. 2 tasks should be active right now but are stuck — identify and clear the blockers today. **3 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.

**Stephanie and Marc Felton:** 3 overdue — tackle the oldest first, they're the most likely to cascade. **20 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $10,098 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.
**CANDACE - JUSTIN P REFERRAL (CNG2025-522):** **5 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.
**Jeff:** Carrying 18 overdue and it's been growing — needs attention today.
**Angel Pacheco:** Carrying 13 overdue and it's been growing — needs attention today.
**Milagros Porturas:** Carrying 6 overdue and it's been growing — needs attention today.

199 tasks starting in the next 7 days. **84 of those have nobody assigned** — these need a name on them before they're due or they'll become overdue with no accountability. 33 overdue payments are holding up the pipeline — every day these sit, the schedule slips further. **$50,682 in payments going out this week** across 27 tasks — make sure funds are available. $43,008 expected in from 3 client payments. Heavy week ahead for Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199) and Stephanie and Marc Felton — make sure resources are lined up.

Angel Pacheco: Angel Pacheco's overdue has been growing over the past few days — now at 13. This needs to turn around today.
**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** 12 overdue — oldest first. **4 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 15 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** 4 overdue — oldest first. **3 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 22 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** 4 overdue — oldest first. **4 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 23 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.
Jeff: Jeff's overdue has been growing over the past few days — now at 18. This needs to turn around today.

**Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199):** 15 overdue (oldest: 12d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. 1 task blocked by payments — escalate, not on you. **17 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 43 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Stephanie and Marc Felton:** 3 overdue — oldest first. **20 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 31 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**CANDACE - JUSTIN P REFERRAL (CNG2025-522):** Clean — 3 tasks in progress. **5 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start.
**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.
Milagros Porturas: Milagros Porturas's overdue has been growing over the past few days — now at 6. This needs to turn around today.
**Kyle Aubry - Project 01:** 5 overdue — oldest first. **13 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 19 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Ginger Brown:** 5 overdue — oldest first. **8 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 25 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496):** 2 overdue — oldest first. 2 active-blocked — clear the blockers to keep moving. **3 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start.
**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.
